bug.description: HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version

prompt:
There is a HARQ process error such as incorrect retransmission or wrong redundancy version downstream of function nr_get_default_pucch_res in the openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB subsystem.
The function is located at openair2/LAYER2/NR_MAC_gNB/gNB_scheduler_primitives.c:1265.
Please investigate and fix this issue.
